Author: egono
Content:
# STRIKE SYSTEM 

> **Warning - First time of abusing. (Unless its a huge AA, its not going to be a warning) @deleted-role **

Ban someone without a explanation.
Worldedit the building area, (10x10 max for warning).
Spam chat.
Make someone say weird shit.
Abuse perms of something you do not have.

> **Strike 1 - Second time of abusing. (Unless it's a huge AA, its not going to be a 1 Strike.) @deleted-role **

All of the above.
Edit the spawn, (small changes like add a house) without permission from lead-staff or spawn builders.) (Instant)
Crash server (once) (If you had a reason why that happened, warning.) (Instant)
Abuse of other player gameplay, /gms ... /title..., anything that messes up a players usual screen. (Without reason, ofcourse) (Instant)
Teleporting me to you, (For JRMOD and MOD and SRMOD.)

> **Strike 2 - Third time of abusing.  (Unless it's a huge AA, its not going to be a 2 Strikes.) @deleted-role **

All of the above.
Delete any messages from ⁠⁠Unknown  or ⁠⁠Unknown , unless really good explanation. (Instant)
Delete channel. (Instant)
Ban, kick @50X [50x.] 4/55 . (Instant)
Ban, kick other staff members, unless asked permission or really needed. (Instant)
**
> Blacklisted - "Strike 3", kicked (banned) from the staff team. (Appealable.) @deleted-role **

All of the above.
Delete the whole spawn.  (Instant)
Expand the 50x border.  (Instant)
Lag machines, by you.  (Instant)
Command block abusement, (stop, kickall, killall...) , (unless a explanation is set.)   (Instant)
(Good thing, you are given permanent donor rank.)  (Instant)

> **Blacklisted - "Strike 4", kicked (banned) from the staff team and IP-banned ingame. Don't care if your brothers' or family members are playing. You fucked up, your ruined the experience for everyone. (Non-Appealable.) @deleted-role  **

Anything that exceeds the Strike 2 or Blacklisted. Common sense thinking.  (Instant)
DDoSing or Doxxing anyone in the staff team.  (Instant)
Cyberbullying non-stop. There is a limit.  (Instant)

This won't be tolerated in any way. I will have NO MERCY FOR ANYONE. (Even if you are Lead Admin or Developer.)

Author: _sakuratea_
Content:
Welcome New Staff

here's a little tip since some people forget or don't know:

Whenever banning a griefer, check how much blocks he broke, it can be a minor grief [warn] or a normal grief [7 days tempban] ( LESS THAN 8 BLOCKS = MINOR GRIEF, MORE THAN 10 = GRIEF, IF THE PLAYER USES NUKE TO GRIEF, INSTANTLY 7 DAYS BAN SO THEY DON'T MESS UP EVEN MORE )

And also, do the command /co rollback *player* *time:, for example "10m" radius: *for example, 100 is the max, 5 is the min

time types:

1s = second
1m = minute
1h = hour

you'll handle it.

Author: egono
Content: Also if huge portion of map is griefed, do a manual ban 30d.

Author: _sakuratea_
Content:
Yeah

oh also Lag Machines, if you see one go and break it, even use autoclicker to break it if necessary but understand the differences of wavemachines, flying machines, lagmachines and the hopper lag

Author: egono
Content: And only sr mods and + can reset the map.

Author: _sakuratea_
Content:
Hopper Lag: basically a hopper is checked by minecraft almost every tick, since it can be or not with items, so many hoppers can lag the server, so if you see that happening, usually underground, watch out for it.

Racism, Homophobia and Nazism: Warn and most of the times, a ban, nazism is basically the red and black flags with **THE** symbol. .

Author: siqns
Content:
For those who did not know,

1. Unfair advantage indeed is not allowed, however only unharmful ones allowed, including song player and autobuild.

2. Not allowed to build flags that are not the latest country flags to prevent conflict.

3. Compulsory for all staffs to take video / photo evidence of rule breakers before punishing them.

This will be a minor change, please comply. I will update this in next season's rules.

Author: _sakuratea_
Content:
A little change to one of the unspoken rules [Annoyance one], Due to Horyzonal, we decided to change this:
If a player teleports you 2 or less, Or annoys you by punching you, First you do a verbal warning [telling them to stop], If they don't stop and do it on purpose, you give them a kick, if even after that they keep doing it, you give an 1 hour ban, for the teleporting case if the player is trying to abuse his /tp on you [teleporting you to them] you give an 1 day ban.

Another change is not to abuse players by Freezing and Smiting them, i've seen Horyzonal has been doing it a lot and it's getting really problematic.

Author: thiscatisd_
Content: I was banned for a week because I was replacing pride skulls with burgers, because I was making a joke about "burger month." Aurora was the mod who banned me. My IGN for minecraft is HaxxerKiller, and my ingame nick while I was banned was Nuker (rank), JamEZ. I think my ban should be shortened to 1 day, or I should be unbanned altogether. I know that unbanning is probably not an option, but I think really think that a week is too long. I've seen people getting than same punishment as me, even though they did far worse things. The only thing I did was that I replaced a few skulls with another skull, as a JOKE. I feel like that should count as a minor grief/annoyance, not as an entire grief. If you do think it is a minor grief, the ban should be turned into a warn or 1 day ban, because 7 days is way too much. Again, I do not want a full unban, but I would think a 1 day ban would fit better for this punishment.

Author: siqns
Content:
**For those who missed the first meeting.**
It is just a test meeting to see who would actually be attending said meetings, more than half of the staff members did join. Then, we discussed on recent things that have been going on in the server, including the recent YouTube streamer raid which bumped our active player count to 101 players for a brief moment. We too held a QnA session, which is mostly towards me about the server, and of course some off topics ones (no I will not tell you my credit card info, iykyk). Lastly, we ended off with small snippets of movie scenes by Djesse_.
